policy.purpose: repeat the #511 R1-R3 loop by widening the admitted API result-domain primitive without adding speculative kernel vocabulary

probes.kernel_need: materialize Collection/Set domain from admitted builtin factory API evidence
probes.reason: list/set/frozenset factory rows already have fixed result domains after unshadowed builtin proof

probes.kernel_need: materialize Collection domain from imported collection factory evidence
probes.reason: imported collections.deque evidence is dependency-backed and its result domain is fixed

probes.kernel_need: materialize Collection/Set domain from Rust std collection factory evidence
probes.reason: std collection factory rows already prove callee identity and have fixed container domains

probes.kernel_need: materialize Map domain from Rust std map factory evidence
probes.reason: HashMap/BTreeMap factory rows have a fixed Map result domain after std path proof

probes.kernel_need: materialize Collection domain from vec!/Vec::new evidence
probes.reason: Vec factory rows have fixed collection result shape once macro/path evidence is admitted

probes.kernel_need: materialize Collection/Set domain from Java collection factory evidence
probes.reason: List.of and Set.of rows are fixed-domain after java.util import proof

probes.kernel_need: materialize Collection domain from Java collection constructor evidence
probes.reason: empty java.util collection constructors have fixed empty collection result shape

probes.kernel_need: materialize Map domain from Java Map factory evidence
probes.reason: Map.of/Map.ofEntries rows have fixed Map result domain after java.util import proof

probes.kernel_need: materialize Set domain from Ruby Set.new evidence
probes.reason: Set.new has a fixed Set result domain after require and shadowing proof

probes.kernel_need: materialize Set/Map domains from JS-like constructor evidence
probes.reason: new Set and new Map rows are fixed-domain after construct and unshadowed global proof

probes.kernel_need: materialize Array domain from Array.from wrapper evidence
probes.reason: Array.from has a fixed Array result domain once the static global method evidence is admitted

probes.kernel_need: materialize PromiseLike domain from Promise.resolve evidence
probes.reason: Promise.resolve has a fixed PromiseLike result domain after static global method proof

probes.kernel_need: preserve #509 receiver-method result-domain chains through the generalized materializer
probes.reason: MapKeyView, scalar integer, Option.and_then, and Promise.then remain admitted through the same primitive

probes.kernel_need: keep Option Some result-domain evidence while removing call-specific direct emission
probes.reason: Some already emitted Option; this cycle moves it behind the same admitted API materializer

probes.kernel_need: external manifest/runtime support for declaring fixed result-domain contracts
probes.reason: the builtin kernel can materialize known contract ids, but external packs cannot yet author executable result-domain rows

probes.kernel_need: project dependency package/version proof before exact API occurrence admission
probes.reason: Guava factory names remain queue signals until package/version occurrence is dependency-backed

probes.kernel_need: trait/import identity plus caller-selected materialized result proof
probes.reason: collect-like result shape is not a fixed API result domain

probes.kernel_need: safe dtype/domain producer before NumPy scalar rows can use result-domain composition
probes.reason: DomainRequirement can consume scalar/integer domains, but NumPy dtype facts are not proven

probes.kernel_need: demand/materialization proof before HOF calls may emit result DomainEvidence
probes.reason: existing HOF compatibility remains internal to protocol consumers; broad call-node DomainEvidence would be unsound

probes.kernel_need: parametric map value-domain proof
probes.reason: Map.get result domain depends on the map value type, not on API identity alone
